title: poa austrouralensis
intro: Poa austrouralensis, also known as Rough Blue Grass, is a perennial grass species native to New Zealand. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which are used in traditional herbal remedies. Research suggests that Poa austrouralensis has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using this plant for medicinal purposes.
